title: E-commerce
headline: Storefronts that convert
tagline: High-converting storefronts with catalogs, checkout, and fulfillment.

problems.title: Manual workflows
problems.description: Teams lose hours on repetitive tasks that should be automated.

problems.title: Disconnected systems
problems.description: Data silos prevent a single view of customer and operations data.

problems.title: Slow iteration
problems.description: Legacy stacks make it hard to ship improvements every sprint.

solutionSummary: Headless commerce stacks with optimized checkout, inventory sync, and fulfillment integrations.
architectureNote: A modular architecture with API gateway, event bus, and managed data stores — designed to scale horizontally and integrate with your stack.

features.title: Unified dashboard
features.description: One place to monitor KPIs, alerts, and team activity.

features.title: Smart automation
features.description: Rules and AI triggers that reduce manual handoffs.

features.title: Secure integrations
features.description: APIs and webhooks that connect your existing tools safely.
